purpose: Machine-readable prompt ladder for Map Explorer implementation. The ledger is the execution source of truth; this manifest defines the ordered prompt catalog.

requiredPreflight: Inspect every file named by the prompt.
Verify prior prompt status from the ledger.
Check repository status if version control metadata is available.
Update the ledger before final response.
requiredValidation: Run lint if available and relevant.
Run targeted tests if the prompt changed logic.
Record exact validation results in the ledger.
amnesiaGuardrails: Do not rely on chat memory.
Do not assume prior prompt completion.
Do not change Synapse IDE or Urban Analytics internals unless the active prompt explicitly requires a contract adapter.
Do not silently mutate layers, spatial evidence artifacts, analysis outputs, report handoffs, dashboard bindings, education state, or IDE file state.
